body_transformation: The quadruped frame now features seamless metallic plating over all limbs, with smooth reflective surfaces replacing the original gray and cream textures. Sharp angular edges replace the rounded leg structures, while subtle engraved patterns flow along the skeletal lines of the body. Reinforced armor plates cover the shoulders and tail base, and glowing blue energy lines pulse beneath the steel surface. The curled tail tip retains its spiral shape but now has a polished metallic sheen with faint mechanical grooves.
signature_feature: Tail tip: polished steel with engraved mechanical grooves and faint blue energy pulses.
